title: SpatialMemory
description: This dataset comprises electroencephalography (EEG) recordings from a visuo-spatial working memory task designed to investigate oscillatory neural dynamics underlying sequence encoding and recall. Participants performed a computerized spatial span task while EEG was recorded to examine theta and gamma band oscillations across younger and older adults. The study examines item-level neural correlates of memory encoding and retrieval, with particular focus on gamma band activity during encoding and theta-gamma phase-amplitude coupling during recall.
methods_description: Participants completed a computerized spatial span task during EEG recording. Neural oscillatory activity was analyzed in the theta and gamma frequency bands during sequence encoding and item-level recall phases. Analyses included examination of gamma band power dynamics and theta-gamma phase-amplitude coupling across serial positions and age groups.
